description: Chic and stylish, this pair ofCanvas shoes from numero uno is light and comfortable on the feet. The black lining holding together the upper and the midsole adds to it a serious style magic. Team this with skirts or jeans for that cool, casual look. Upper Canvas upper for durability, comfort, breathability and easy maintenance Stitch detailing for durability and style Long tongue for comfort Lace-up system for snug Fit Durable rubber toe box for forefoot protection and easy cleaning Metallic eyelets on medial midfoot for breathability Brand badge appliqued on tongue and embossed on lateral forefoot and heel for style Midsole PU midsole for durability and cushioning Padded sockliner with cambreel lining for all-day comfort Textured toe box foxing for added durability and protection to the forefoot Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern on the toe and heel region, with diamond shaped lugs and grooves on the rest of the foot, coupled with slanting grooves along the periphery for maximum traction and grip shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
